response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in building scalable systems across cloud (AWS) and distributed architectures
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and projects
concerns: No explicit demonstration of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
Career gap since Oct 2025 and recent role at re:cinq is only 7 months — insufficient tenure to validate impact
Lacks documented experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers
